raw_prompt: the checkout page is slow, make it faster

clarify.question:
What is the primary bottleneck on the checkout page?

A) Page load time (initial render/asset delivery)
B) Interaction latency (form submission, API calls)
C) Rendering performance (UI jank, re-renders)
D) Backend API response time
E) Database queries

Also: are there any metrics (load time target, current baseline) or user-reported slowness patterns?
clarify.memory_record: User wants to optimize checkout page performance; needs diagnosis of bottleneck type before proposing changes.

answer: The database side — api/checkout.py runs a separate query per line item, so checkout drags on big carts (p95 is around 3s). Keep the public API and behavior unchanged, and add a regression/benchmark test.

rewrite.memory_record: User identified checkout.py database query-per-line-item as bottleneck; optimize queries while preserving API contract and adding test coverage.
rewrite.downstream_prompt:
Optimize api/checkout.py to reduce database query count for checkout operations with large carts. Currently, the code runs one query per line item, causing p95 latency around 3s. Batch or join the queries to reduce round trips. Preserve the public API surface and behavior exactly. Add a regression test or benchmark that validates the optimization and confirms no performance degradation on subsequent changes.
